questions.question: Where were you between 9:00 PM and 10:30 PM?
When did you last see Elena Park alive?
Why did Elena call you at 9:12 PM?
How do you explain your badge being used at 9:18 PM?
Were you and Elena arguing about the audit or missing records?
What do you know about the missing USB drive?
Who can confirm when you left the investor reception?
How would you describe your working relationship with Elena?
The call, badge log, and missing drive all point back to you. What are you leaving out?
